params.amount: The amount of stETH to deposit

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.amount: Amount of yield to spend (in stETH)
params.purpose: Description of what's being paid for

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

MIN_DEPOSIT().notice: Minimum deposit to open a treasury (prevent dust)

WITHDRAWAL_LOCK().notice: Time lock duration for principal withdrawals (7 days)

completeWithdrawal().notice: Complete a pending withdrawal after time lock

deposit(uint256,uint256).notice: Deposit stETH to open or add to an agent treasury

getAvailableYield(address).notice: Get the available yield for an agent to spend

getTreasuryInfo(address).notice: Get treasury info for an agent

initiateWithdrawal(uint256).notice: Initiate a principal withdrawal (subject to time lock)

isWithdrawalReady(address).notice: Check if a withdrawal is ready

spendYield(address,uint256,string).notice: Spend accumulated yield on allowlisted services

totalPrincipal().notice: Total principal locked across all agents

treasuries(address).notice: Mapping of agent addresses to their treasury info
